creator: jonnywade@hotmail.com
text:
When using the ruby-pdflib port, pdflib.so, the following error is received:

/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/i386-freebsd6/pdflib.so: warning: defining PDF.allocate is deprecated; use rb_define_alloc_func()

I'm using the Ruby port. Output of 'ruby -v':

ruby 1.8.6 (2007-03-13 patchlevel 0) [i386-freebsd6]

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Any ruby script that requires and uses the pdflib library will exhibit this problem.
